page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3.13xlarge is a storage and database optimized server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 52 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 Intel Xeon 8269CY processor operating at a base frequency of 2.5 GHz. The CPU configuration allocates exactly one thread per core, providing dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading. The instance is equipped with 384.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 7.38 GB of RAM per core, and includes 11519 GB of local SSD storage.

Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps. The hardware profile lacks dedicated GPU accelerators, making it unsuitable for hardware-accelerated graphics or deep learning workloads. However, the high density of local SSD storage combined with a substantial memory footprint makes this instance class highly efficient for data-intensive operations. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance, though the absence of hyperthreading means multi-threaded workloads cannot leverage virtual thread scaling on the same physical cores.

This server configuration is designed for workloads requiring large local storage capacity and high memory availability. Suitable use cases include large-scale relational and non-relational databases, distributed file systems, data warehousing, and transactional processing systems. The high local SSD capacity allows for rapid data access and low-latency storage operations, while the 384.0 GB of RAM supports large in-memory caches and data buffers.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3.13xlarge is a storage-optimized server instance featuring 52 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz. Utilizing the KVM hypervisor and an x86_64 architecture, the instance allocates one thread per core, ensuring dedicated compute performance without hyperthreading. It is equipped with 384.0 GB of system memory, providing 7.38 GB of RAM per core, alongside 11519 GB of local SSD storage. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps. Lacking GPU acceleration, this instance is designed for high-capacity local storage and memory-intensive applications. It is suited for large-scale databases, data warehousing, transactional processing, and distributed file systems requiring consistent compute resources and substantial local storage capacity.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3.13xlarge is a storage-optimized server with 52 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 384 GB RAM, and 11519 GB of local SSD storage, designed for large-scale database workloads.

tagline: A storage-optimized server featuring dedicated physical cores, substantial memory, and high-capacity local SSD storage for data-intensive workloads.
